title: Floral Molten Arabian Cream Pudding
description: A nostalgic Middle Eastern dessert that blends fragrant rose water, rich clotted cream, and pistachio butter into a silky molten pudding finished with a hint of saffron.
instructions: In a medium saucepan combine clotted cream, almond milk, and sugar and heat over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat and whisk in vanilla extract, rose water, and a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Stir in pistachio butter until fully incorporated and the mixture thickens slightly.
Fold in cocoa powder until no streaks remain.
Pour the batter into four small ramekins or heatproof glasses.
Bake at 180°C for 12-14 minutes until the edges are set but the center remains slightly soft.
Let the puddings rest for 2 minutes, then carefully invert onto plates.
Garnish with sliced pistachios and a few saffron strands, and serve immediately.
